# Security Vulnerability Report

Thank you for helping improve SVP Kernel security.

SVP Kernel encourages responsible disclosure of security issues affecting runtime safety, policy enforcement, and autonomous agent workflows.

Please avoid publicly disclosing vulnerabilities before they have been reviewed.
